[1mAvailable Styles[0m (Note: the default is "light"):
       ascii             ascii-header            booktabs               dashed                 dots

| Ce1 | Ce2 | Ce3 |   | Ce1 | Ce2 | Ce3 |       Ce1 Ce2 Ce3       ┆ Ce1 ┆ Ce2 ┆ Ce3 ┆   ┊ Ce1 ┊ Ce2 ┊ Ce3 ┊
